---
title: "Pose-coupled native-interaction weighting for kinase ensemble docking: retrospective evaluation on EGFR and CDK2"
short-title: "Pose-coupled native-interaction weighting"
author:
  - name: "Evangelia Mitropoulou"
    email: "evangelia.mitr@gmail.com"
    affiliations:
      - ref: unipatras
  - name: "Dimitris Giannopoulos"
    email: "dimit.giannopoulos@ac.upatras.gr"
    affiliations:
      - ref: unipatras
affiliations:
  - id: unipatras
    name: "Department of Chemistry, University of Patras, University Campus, 26504 Rio, Patras, Greece"
bibliography: references.bib
reference-section-title: References
format:
  typst:
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
    citeproc: true
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 10pt
    margin:
      x: 2.1cm
      y: 2.0cm
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
  docx: default
execute:
  echo: false
---

{{< include syndesis_jcheminformatics_v2_content.md >}}
